#Azehagowa

Azehagowa is a lightweight project repository maintained by azehagowa-creator.
This package is designed to provide a clean, minimal, and extendable foundation for Node.js-based applications.


---

🚀 Installation

Clone the repository:

git clone https://github.com/azehagowa-creator/Azehagowa.git
cd Azehagowa

Install dependencies:

npm install


---

▶️ Usage

Start the project:

npm start

Or run directly:

node index.js


---

📦 Project Structure

Azehagowa/
│── index.js
│── package.json
│── README.md


---

🛠 Requirements

Node.js (v18+ recommended)

npm
